sigWerErrors.reason: The insertion of a greeting and assistant introduction does not change the meaning of the main request; it is just extra context.
'Quisiera' (I would like) is more polite than 'quiero' (I want), but the intent of requesting is preserved.
The only difference is the accent mark, which does not affect meaning in this context.
